purpose: Make a quiet week useful by recording what was checked, why nothing changed, and when to retry instead of inventing progress.

public_safety.public_export_rule: A public no-op record may mention artifact names and high-level status only.

template_fields.description: Stable ID for this weekly checkpoint.
The week or review period covered by the check.
The last version, artifact, or verified state that remains valid.
What Codex or the operator was asked to check in this run.
Current public/private boundary, repo state, or dashboard baseline.
Approved public-safe sources, artifacts, or registries that were checked.
List of changed work lines; empty array means no meaningful public-safe change.
Checks used when the primary source had no update or was unavailable.
Files, reports, scans, or URLs that prove the no-op was verified.
Whether to update artifacts, keep current state, or stop due to a blocker.
Only fill when decision is blocked.
When or under what condition the next run should check again.
Whether a public page update is needed after this checkpoint.
Whether redaction scan must run before publishing.

decision_rules.use_when: There is at least one public-safe change, new artifact, or approved planning update.
required_proof: redaction scan if public package changes

decision_rules.use_when: Sources were checked and no meaningful public-safe change exists.
The next step requires private data, external contact, account action, unclear source access, or Kevin approval.

example_public_safe_record.session_state: Checked public-safe planning artifacts for new approved changes.
example_public_safe_record.project_context_state: Public review repo remains noindex and contains no private records.
example_public_safe_record.next_retry_gate: next weekly refresh or Kevin-approved new material

owner_split.Kevin 做: 判斷是否真的有新方向、是否要改公開頁或進 private implementation。
owner_split.夥伴做: 提供公開安全來源整理與本週變動摘要。
owner_split.Codex 做: 比對 artifact、產出 checkpoint、更新頁面與跑驗證。
owner_split.自動化: 在 report-first 模式下提醒、檢查連結、跑 redaction scan，沒有變動時輸出 no-op。

not_allowed: change public site without Kevin instruction
